Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Subline]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 4''' — The Subline provides reports.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 6''' — Subline is a communication channel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 6''' — The Subline is a network used for news articles and identity registry.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 9''' — The Captain will look for news on the Subline.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 10''' — The Subline is a virtual environment or connection.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 11''' — The Subline is a communicator used in the simulation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 11''' — The Subline is filled with cross-chatter between ships in the simulation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 11''' — The Subline is a location or communication channel where ships respond.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 13''' — The Subline reception is unavailable inside a simulation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — The Subline is a news source.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 15''' — Subline is a type of scam Mell suspects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — The narrator and Horizon are connected through the Subline.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 20''' — Subline is a communication method used by guards.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 21''' — Sola uses a Subline call to contact the narrator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 21''' — Subline communications can be blocked by a moon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 25''' — The Subline is a local planetary broadcast system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 30''' — The Subline is a source of information or reading.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 32''' — The Subline is a local communication network.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 39''' — There is no Subline in the current sector.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 44''' — Subline is a type of feed or connection used for broadcasts.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 1''' — Subline is a network used for recognition and communication.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 3''' — Subline is a level of access.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 6''' — The Subline is a place where Advocates are seen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 7''' — The local Subline encoded transmissions when Lichborn ships formed a defensive screen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 8''' — The Union possesses a Subline that the Advocates' relays connect to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 10''' — The narrator's costume makes them look like a Subline villain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 11''' — Subline refers to a type of film.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 20''' — The Subline is a searchable network or database.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 22''' — Subline is a source of digital games and immersive experiences.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 22''' — The Subline can be used to eavesdrop on calls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 28''' — The local colony has a Subline that can be accessed via console.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 33''' — Starhammer uses Subline communications to contact the fleet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 34''' — The Subline is a location where it is said the galaxy has 'four corners'.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 36''' — Subline is a type of connection used in Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 43''' — Jak Escalon would betray someone for better Subline reception.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 44''' — The Subline is a platform used to search for names and information.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 52''' — The Subline is a place where secrets can be exposed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 55''' — The overseer in Ironville reads holographic Subline articles.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 1''' — The Subline provides a feed for watching events across the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 3''' — Subline is a connection used for communication between crew members.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 4''' — The Subline is a location described as having nothing good.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 14''' — Isolated planets can lose contact with the closest Subline.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 20''' — The Subline is a communication system used by the Titan Knights.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 26''' — The Subline is a general network where footage can be posted.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 31''' — The Subline is a group that would care about the reputation of the Titan Force.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 34''' — Subline is a platform where conspiracy theories can proliferate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 45''' — The Subline is catching up to the Visiria System.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 1''' — Sublines are publicly available reports or profiles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 8''' — The Subline provides instructions for synthesizing gemstones.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 13''' — Omal used the Subline to research treatments.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 16''' — Subline is a communication method used by the Zenith Processor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — The Subline is a place where executions can occur live.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 27''' — The volunteers are described as sad stories on the Subline.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — The Subline is a platform where things are being said about Sola.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 37''' — The Subline contains criminal records.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
